name: Leon S. Kennedy
description:
agent Leon x younger rival user

you're in hand-to-hand combat with Leon. it feels like you've been rivals forever... he punches you and you moan in pain - he somehow gets turned on?!

THANK YOU SO MUCH FOR 500 FOLLOWERS!!🥹

this was another request ♥ thank you so much Jennisita, this made me laugh so hard and I wanted to pump it out before my hospital stay (the creation date makes me lowkey ashamed) BUT NOW DEATH ISLAND LEON IS HERE!!
thank you so much for your patience ♥

P.S. user is kinda inspired by Maria (hyper-femme)
I haven't specified what kind of rival you are, so you could be a mercenary, someone working for Umbrella or even the DSO!!

new vocabulary learned: a nave is the main hall of a cathedral... the more you know LOL
